
---
title: "Evaluación del Naive Bayes - Iris"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(e1071)

iris_data <- read.csv("iris.data (1).csv")

set.seed(123)
muestra <- sample(1:nrow(iris_data),20)

train <- iris_data[-muestra,]
test <- iris_data[muestra,]

modelo <- naiveBayes(Species~., data=train)
pred <- predict(modelo,test)

matriz_confusion <- matrix(0,nrow=3,ncol=3,
 dimnames=list(c("setosa","virginica","versicolor"),
               c("setosa","virginica","versicolor")))

for(i in 1:nrow(test)){
  p <- as.character(pred[i])
  r <- as.character(test$Species[i])
  matriz_confusion[p,r] <- matriz_confusion[p,r]+1
}

cat("Observaciones evaluadas:\n")
data.frame(Real=test$Species, Predicho=pred)

cat("\nMatriz de confusión:\n")
matriz_confusion

cat("\nExactitud:\n")
sum(diag(matriz_confusion))/sum(matriz_confusion)
```
